backend/main.mo: Motoko actor defining a Recipe type and exposing a hardcoded list of 10+ Indian recipes (Masala Dosa, Chole Bhature, Paneer Tikka, Biryani, etc.) with metadata including name, description, cuisine type, difficulty, cooking time, ingredients, and video URLs.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features listed.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React files describing the app structure: routing, layout, recipe gallery, detail pages, filters, cards, grid, hooks, and styling with Indian-inspired design tokens.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining CSS custom properties for light and dark themes using OKLCH color space, including color tokens for background, foreground, borders, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with viewport meta tag, title 'Indian Recipe Gallery', and a root div mounting the React app from main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: TanStack Router setup defining root, index (gallery), and recipe detail routes, all wrapped in a Layout component, and exporting the configured RouterProvider.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Layout component with hero banner image, site title 'RasoiVidya', navigation outlet, and footer with copyright and caffeine.ai attribution link.
frontend/src/components/RecipeCard.tsx: Recipe card component displaying video placeholder, category icon overlay, recipe name/description, difficulty badge, cooking time, and cuisine type with hover effects and navigation to detail page.
frontend/src/components/RecipeFilters.ts: Filter UI component with search input, dropdowns for cuisine type/difficulty/cooking time, active filter badges, clear filters button, and result count display with category icons.
frontend/src/components/RecipeGrid.tsx: Responsive grid layout component rendering an array of RecipeCard components in a 1/2/3 column layout with staggered fade-in animations.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook managing backend actor creation with Internet Identity authentication, returning actor instance and invalidating dependent queries when identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity storage, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching recipes data from the backend actor, including getting all recipes and fetching a single recipe by name.
frontend/src/hooks/useRecipeFilters.ts: Custom hook that manages recipe filtering state (search, cuisine, difficulty, time range) and returns filtered recipes with utility functions to clear filters.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom Indian-inspired color palette (saffron, turmeric, terracotta, emerald) using OKLCH color space, supporting both light and dark modes with custom utility classes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/RecipeDetail.tsx: Recipe detail page component that displays a single recipe with video placeholder, metadata badges, cooking time, and navigation back to gallery using route parameters.
frontend/src/pages/RecipeGallery.tsx: Main recipe gallery page that integrates recipe fetching, filtering controls, and grid display with loading and error states.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending default theme with custom OKLCH color system, Indian-inspired palette, container settings, and animation keyframes for accordion and other UI components.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking a video-centric Indian food recipe app with 6 existing features (video browsing, masonry layout, detailed recipe view, filtering/search, Indian-inspired visual theme, and static asset generation) and multiple pending feature requests. Contains schema version 1.0.0 at project state version 5 with architectural notes emphasizing video presentation and modern UI/UX design.
